          have := log_lt_iff_lt_exp hx'
          have : log x > 50 := by
            have : exp (50 : ℝ) < x := hx
            exact (log_lt_iff_lt_exp (lt_trans (by simpa using (exp_pos 50)) hx)).2 this
          exact this
        nlinarith
      exact ⟨lt_of_lt_of_le h50 (le_of_lt hT.1), hT.2⟩)

simpa [ε₁] using (theorem_3_1 (x := x) (T := T) hx (by
    refine ⟨(2 * Int.ceil x), ?_, ?_⟩
    · have : Odd (2 * Int.ceil x : ℤ) := by
        simpa [two_mul] using (odd_mul.2 ⟨by decide, by simp⟩)
      exact this
    · have hxle : (x : ℝ) ≤ Int.ceil x := by
        simpa using (Int.le_ceil x)
      have : (x : ℝ) = (2 * (Int.ceil x : ℤ)) / 2 := by
        norm_cast
      simpa [this] ) (by
    have : T ∈ Set.Ioo 50 x := by
      refine ⟨?_, (hT.2.trans_le (by
        have hx' : 0 < x := lt_trans (by positivity : (0:ℝ) < exp 50) hx
        have : √x / 3 < x := by
          have hsqrt : √x < x := by
            have hx1 : 1 < x := lt_trans (by
              have : (1:ℝ) < exp 50 := by
                have : (0:ℝ) < 50 := by norm_num
                simpa using (exp_lt_exp.2 this)
              exact this) hx
            have hxpos : 0 ≤ x := le_of_lt (lt_trans (by positivity : (0:ℝ) < exp 50) hx)
            have : √x < √(x^2) := by
              have : x < x^2 := by
                nlinarith
              exact (Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt_iff hxpos).2 this
            simpa [Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs, abs_of_pos (lt_trans (by positivity : (0:ℝ) < exp 50) hx), pow_two] using this
          have h3 : (0:ℝ) < 3 := by norm_num
          exact (div_lt_iff h3).2 (lt_of_lt_of_le (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hsqrt h3) (by
            have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_trans (by positivity : (0:ℝ) < exp 50) hx
            nlinarith [hxpos]))
        exact le_of_lt hsqrt)).1⟩
      · have h50 : (50:ℝ) < 3 * log x := by
          have hxlog : log x > 50 := by
            have hxexp : exp 50 < x := hx
            have := (Real.log_lt_iff_lt_exp (by
              have : (0:ℝ) < x := lt_trans (by positivity : (0:ℝ) < exp 50) hx
              exact this)).2 ?_
            · exact this
            · simpa using hxexp
          nlinarith
        exact lt_trans h50 hT.1
    exact this))

simpa [ε₁] using theorem_3_1 (x := x) (T := T) hx (by
    refine ⟨(2 * x).toNat, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa using (Nat.odd_iff_not_even.2 (by
        have : ¬ Even ((2 * x).toNat) := by
          simpa using Nat.not_even_bit1 0
        exact this))
    · have : ((2 * x).toNat : ℝ) / 2 = x := by
        simpa using (Real.toNat_of_nonneg (mul_nonneg (by norm_num) (le_of_lt (lt_trans (by norm_num) hx))).symm)
      simpa [this, two_mul] ) (by
    have hxpos : x > 0 := lt_trans (by simpa using (exp_pos 50)) hx
    have : 50 < T := lt_trans (by
      have : (3 * log x) > 50 := by
        have : log x > 50 := by
          have : x > exp 50 := hx
          have := (log_lt_log hxpos (lt_trans (by simpa using (exp_pos 50)) hx)).2 this
          simpa using this
        linarith
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_of_lt hT.1)) (lt_of_lt_of_le hT.1 (le_of_lt hT.2))
    exact ⟨this, hT.2⟩)

simpa [ε₁] using theorem_3_1 (x := x) (T := T) hx (by
    refine ⟨(2 * x).toInt, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa using (Int.even_toInt (2 * x)).odd_of_not_even (by
        intro h
        have : (2 : ℝ) ∣ (2 * x) := ⟨x, by ring⟩
        exact (by
          have := Int.not_even_of_odd (by
            simpa using (show Odd ((2 * x).toInt) from by
              simpa using (Int.odd_iff_not_even.mpr h)))
          contradiction))
    · simp)
    (by
      have h50 : (50 : ℝ) < 3 * log x := by
        have hxlog : log x > 50 := by
          have hx' : x > exp 50 := hx
          have : log (exp 50) < log x := log_lt_log (by
            have : (0 : ℝ) < exp 50 := by positivity
            exact lt_trans this (lt_trans (by have := exp_pos 50; linarith) (by linarith)) ) hx'
          simpa [log_exp] using this
        linarith
      exact ⟨lt_trans h50 hT.1, hT.2⟩)

simpa [ε₁] using theorem_3_1 (x := x) (T := T) hx (by
    refine ⟨(2 * x).toInt, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa [Int.odd_iff_not_even] using (Int.odd_toInt (2 * x))
    · simp) (by
    have h50 : (50 : ℝ) < T := lt_trans (by linarith [hT.1]) hT.1
    exact ⟨h50, hT.2⟩)

simpa [ε₁] using theorem_3_1 (x := x) (T := T) hx (by
    refine ⟨(2 * x).toNat, ?_, by
      have hx' : (0 : ℝ) < x := lt_trans (by norm_num) hx
      simp [Nat.cast_ofNat, hx'.ne']⟩
    exact Nat.odd_iff.mpr (by
      have : (2 * (2 * x).toNat + 1) % 2 = 1 := by simp
      exact this)) (by
    have h50 : (50 : ℝ) < T := by
      have : 50 < 3 * log x := by
        have hx50 : log x > 50 := by
          have : exp 50 < x := hx
          have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_trans (by norm_num) hx
          simpa [Real.log_exp] using (Real.strictMonoOn_log (by intro y hy; exact hy.ne') (by intro y hy; exact hy)).lt_iff_lt.mp this
        linarith
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_of_lt hT.1)
    exact ⟨h50, hT.2⟩)

simpa [ε₁] using theorem_3_1 (x := x) (T := T) hx (by
    refine ⟨1, ?_, by simp⟩
    simp) (by
    have h50 : (50 : ℝ) < T := by
      have hxlog : (50 : ℝ) < log x := by
        have hx1 : x > 0 := lt_trans (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) < exp 50) hx
        have hxexp : exp 50 < x := hx
        have := (Real.strictMonoOn_log ?_ ?_).2 hxexp
        · simpa [Real.log_exp] using this
        · exact (exp_pos 50).ne'
        · exact hx1.ne'
      have h3log : 3 * log x < T := (Set.mem_Ioo.mp hT).1
      exact lt_trans (lt_trans (by linarith) (by nlinarith)) h3log
    have hxT : T < x := by
      have hTs : T < sqrt x / 3 := (Set.mem_Ioo.mp hT).2
      have hxpos : x > 0 := lt_trans (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) < exp 50) hx
      have hsx : sqrt x < x := by
        have hx1 : 1 < x := lt_trans (by
          have : (1 : ℝ) < exp 50 := by
            simpa using (Real.one_lt_exp_iff.mpr (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 50))
          exact this) hx
        simpa [Real.sqrt_lt] using (show sqrt x < x from by
          have : sqrt x < x := by
            have hx' : x ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hxpos
            have : (sqrt x)^2 < x^2 := by
              have : x < x^2 := by nlinarith
              simpa [sq, Real.sq_sqrt (le_of_lt hxpos)] using this
            have hs : 0 ≤ sqrt x := Real.sqrt_nonneg x
            exact lt_of_pow_lt_pow_left₀ (show (0:ℝ) ≤ sqrt x from hs) (by decide : 0 < (2:ℕ)) this
          exact this)
      have : T < sqrt x := lt_of_lt_of_le (by
        have : (sqrt x / 3) ≤ sqrt x := by
          have hs : 0 ≤ sqrt x := Real.sqrt_nonneg x
          nlinarith
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le hTs this) (le_rfl)
      exact lt_trans this (by
        have hx1 : 1 < x := lt_trans (by
          have : (1 : ℝ) < exp 50 := by
            simpa using (Real.one_lt_exp_iff.mpr (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 50))
          exact this) hx
        have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_trans (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) < exp 50) hx
        have hs : sqrt x < x := by
          have : sqrt x < x := by
            have hxgt1 : x > 1 := hx1
            have : sqrt x < x := by
              have : (sqrt x)^2 < x^2 := by
                simpa [Real.sq_sqrt (le_of_lt hxpos), sq] using (show x < x^2 from by nlinarith)
              have hs0 : 0 ≤ sqrt x := Real.sqrt_nonneg x
              exact lt_of_pow_lt_pow_left₀ hs0 (by decide : 0 < (2:ℕ)) this
            exact this
          exact this
        exact hs))
    exact ⟨h50, hxT⟩)

simpa [ε₁] using theorem_3_1 (x := x) (T := T) hx (by
    refine ⟨(2 : ℤ) * ⌈x⌉₊ - 1, ?_, by
      simp [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, two_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
      ⟩
    refine ⟨?_, by
      simp⟩
    simp) (by
    have h50 : (50 : ℝ) < 3 * log x := by
      have hx1 : x > 1 := lt_trans (by simpa using (exp_lt_exp.1 (by linarith : (0:ℝ) < 50))) hx
      have hxlog : log x > 0 := by simpa using log_pos hx1
      linarith
    have hT' : T ∈ Set.Ioo 50 x := by
      refine ⟨lt_of_lt_of_le h50 (le_of_lt hT.1), ?_⟩
      exact lt_trans hT.2 (lt_of_lt_of_le (by
        have : (0 : ℝ) < x := lt_trans (by positivity : (0:ℝ) < exp 50) (by exact hx)
        have hxsqrt : sqrt x ≤ x := by
          have hx1 : 1 ≤ x := le_trans (by norm_num) (le_of_lt (lt_trans (by positivity : (1:ℝ) < exp 50) hx))
          simpa [sqrt_eq_rpow] using (Real.sqrt_le_self (le_trans (by norm_num) hx1))
        have : (sqrt x) / 3 < x := by
          have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_trans (by positivity : (0:ℝ) < exp 50) hx
          have hx3 : (0:ℝ) < 3 := by norm_num
          have : sqrt x < 3 * x := by
            have : sqrt x ≤ x := Real.sqrt_le_self (le_of_lt hxpos)
            have hxlt : x < 3 * x := by nlinarith [hxpos]
            exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hxlt
          nlinarith) (le_of_lt (by
        have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_trans (by positivity : (0:ℝ) < exp 50) hx
        exact (div_lt_self (sqrt_pos.2 hxpos) (by norm_num)))))
    exact hT')

simpa [ε₁] using theorem_3_1 (x := x) (T := T) hx (by
    rcases exists_half_odd_of_gt_exp_50 hx with ⟨X, hX, rfl⟩
    exact ⟨X, hX, rfl⟩) (by
    have h50 : (50 : ℝ) < T := lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith) (le_of_lt hT.1)
    have hTx : T < x := lt_of_lt_of_le hT.2 (by
      have hxpos : 0 ≤ x := le_of_lt (lt_trans (by exact exp_pos 50) hx)
      have : √x / 3 ≤ x := by
        have hx1 : 1 ≤ x := by
          have : (1 : ℝ) < x := lt_trans (by
            have : (1 : ℝ) < exp 50 := by
              have : (0 : ℝ) < (50 : ℝ) := by linarith
              simpa using (exp_lt_exp.mpr this)
            exact this) hx
          exact le_of_lt this
        have hsqrt : √x ≤ x := by
          simpa [Real.sqrt_le_iff] using (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hx1 (by exact hxpos))
        have hdiv : √x / 3 ≤ √x := by
          have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ √x := Real.sqrt_nonneg x
          nlinarith
        exact le_trans (le_trans hdiv hsqrt) (le_rfl)
      exact le_trans this (le_rfl))
    exact ⟨h50, hTx⟩)

simpa [ε₁] using theorem_3_1 (x := x) (T := T) hx (by
    rcases exists_int_eq_div_two_of_isRat hx.ne' (by
      have : (x / 1 : ℝ) = x := by field_simp
      exact ⟨x, by simpa using this⟩) with ⟨X, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨X, ?_, rfl⟩
    by_cases hX : Odd X
    · exact hX
    · exfalso
      exact hX (by
        have : Odd X := by
          classical
          simpa using hX
        exact this))
    (by
      have h50 : (50 : ℝ) < T := by
        have h3 : (3 * log x : ℝ) < T := hT.1
        have hxlog : (50 : ℝ) < log x := by
          have hx' : exp 50 < x := hx
          have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_trans (by simpa using (exp_pos (50 : ℝ))) hx'
          have := (log_lt_iff_lt_exp hxpos).2
          simpa [exp_log hxpos] using this hx'
        have : (50 : ℝ) < 3 * log x := lt_of_lt_of_le (by nlinarith) (le_of_lt (by nlinarith [hxlog]))
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_of_lt h3)
      exact ⟨h50, hT.2⟩)

simpa [ε₁] using theorem_3_1 (x := x) (T := T) hx (hodd := by
    refine ⟨(2 * x).toInt, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa using (Int.odd_iff_not_even).2 (by
        intro h
        have : (2 : ℝ) ∣ x := by
          refine ⟨x, by ring⟩
        exact False.elim (by
          have : (2 : ℝ) ∣ (2 * x) := ⟨x, by ring⟩
          have : (2 : ℤ) ∣ (2 * x).toInt := by
            simpa using Int.dvd_toInt (by
              refine ⟨x, ?_⟩
              ring)
          exact False.elim (by
            have := Int.even_iff_two_dvd.2 this
            exact h this)))
    · simp
  ) (hT := by
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · have : (3 : ℝ) * log x > 50 := by
        have hx' : log x > 50 := by
          have : x > exp 50 := hx
          have hxpos : x > 0 := lt_trans (by simpa using (exp_pos 50)) hx
          have : log x > log (exp 50) := log_lt_log hxpos hx
          simpa using this
        linarith
      exact lt_trans this hT.1
    · exact hT.2
  )

simpa [ε₁] using theorem_3_1 (x := x) (T := T) hx (by
    classical
    refine ⟨(2 * (Int.ceil x)), ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact Int.even_mul_self_odd (Int.ceil x)
    · simp) (by
    rcases hT with ⟨hTl, hTu⟩
    have h50 : (50 : ℝ) < T := lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith [show (50:ℝ) < 3 * 50 by norm_num]) (le_of_lt hTl)
    exact ⟨h50, lt_of_lt_of_le hTu (le_trans (by
      have : (sqrt x / 3) ≤ x := by
        have hx1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ x := le_trans (by norm_num) (le_of_lt (lt_trans (by norm_num) hx))
        have : sqrt x ≤ x := by
          have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := le_trans (by norm_num) hx1
          have hs : sqrt x ≤ x := by
            have : sqrt x ≤ sqrt x * sqrt x := by
              simpa [mul_assoc] using (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hx1 (by
                have : 0 ≤ sqrt x := Real.sqrt_nonneg x
                exact this))
            simpa [Real.mul_self_sqrt (le_trans (by norm_num) hx1)] using this
          exact hs
        have : sqrt x / 3 ≤ x / 3 := by
          exact (div_le_div_right (by norm_num)).2 this
        have : x / 3 ≤ x := by
          have : (0:ℝ) ≤ x := le_trans (by norm_num) hx1
          nlinarith
        exact le_trans this (le_of_eq (by ring))
      exact this) (by
      have : x ≤ x := le_rfl
      exact this))⟩)
